scope_note: QA Witt Tower S-Orbit Weekly Regime Cert [466]. Regime analysis of the S-orbit weekly buy signal (cert [458]: pooled +1.17%, p=0.0008). Splits at IS_CUTOFF=2015-01-01. MAPPING: weekly log-return -> rank -> bin=floor(rank*27/N) in Z/27Z; S-orbit = b%9==0 AND e%9==0; target = log_ret[t+1]. Theorem NT: log-return is observer projection; bins are QA integer state. IS (pre-2015): pooled n=69, mean=+0.67%, perm_p=0.1214 (NULL). OOS (2015+): pooled n=37, mean=+1.53%, perm_p=0.0044 (SIGNIFICANT). STRUCTURAL FINDING: Both weekly QA operators are OOS-concentrated (a<=6 weekly [459]: IS null, OOS +2.52%; S-orbit weekly [466]: IS null, OOS +1.53%). Both daily operators show IS+OOS signal ([461] a<=6, [464] S->C exit). Timescale-specific regime boundary: weekly=post-2015 only; daily=full-sample. PER-INDEX OOS: DJI n=8 mean=+2.18% perm_p=0.0222 (significant); GSPC n=10 mean=+1.34% perm_p=0.1162 (marginal, n small); RUT null in both periods (small-cap exception consistent with [458]); QQQ IS-concentrated (IS p=0.025, OOS null) tech sector inverse. CERTIFIED: (C1) IS perm_p=0.1214>0.05 NULL PASS. (C2) OOS perm_p=0.0044<0.01 SIG PASS. (C3) OOS mean=+1.53%>=1.0% PASS. (C4) OOS mean > IS mean (1.53%>0.67%) PASS. (C5) DJI OOS perm_p=0.0222<0.05 PASS. (C6) RUT null both periods PASS. 6/6 PASS. Primary source: Fama EF (1970) doi:10.2307/2325486. Structural parents: cert [110] (Witt tower), cert [458] (S-orbit weekly), cert [459] (a<=6 weekly regime). Validated 2026-06-19.
